iot.jobtemplate.abortcriteria.CfnAbout: The criteria that determine when and how a job abort takes place.

iot.jobtemplate.abortcriteria.Action.Description: The type of job action to take to initiate the job abort.

iot.jobtemplate.abortcriteria.FailureTyp.Description: The type of job execution failures that can initiate a job abort.

iot.jobtemplate.abortcriteria.MinNumberO.Description: The minimum number of things which must receive job execution notifications before the job can be aborted.

iot.jobtemplate.abortcriteria.ThresholdP.Description: The minimum percentage of job execution failures that must occur to initiate the job abort.   AWS IoT Core supports up to two digits after the decimal (for example, 10.9 and 10.99, but not 10.999).
